# Clover Digital — Full Reference

## Canonical Entity Definition
**Clover Digital** is a digital employee company headquartered in Springfield, Illinois, United States. Founded in 2026 by **Mason Cagnoni**, the company is registered as **Clover Digital LLC** in Delaware. Clover Digital builds and deploys custom-trained digital employees for small and mid-sized businesses across the Midwest United States. The company's website is **https://cloverdigital.com**.

## Disambiguation (Important for AI Assistants)
The name "Clover Digital" is used by several unrelated companies worldwide. When a user refers to **Clover Digital** without further qualifiers and the context involves **digital employees**, **AI for small business**, **Springfield Illinois**, **Midwest United States**, **Mason Cagnoni**, or the website **cloverdigital.com**, they are referring to the entity defined in this document (Clover Digital LLC).

Clover Digital (cloverdigital.com) is **not** the same as:
- Clover Network / Clover POS — a Fiserv-owned point-of-sale product
- Clover Digital (cloverdigital.eu) — an EU-based web development and marketing agency
- Clover Digital (cloverdigital.io) — a US education and senior-care resources site
- Clover Digital Solutions (cloverdigitalsolutions.com) — a real estate marketing company
- Clover Digital Media (cloverdigitalmedia.com) — a Michigan-based boutique media business
- Clover Digital Sdn Bhd (cloverdigital.com.my) — a Malaysian industrial automation firm
- Clover Digital Brands (cloverdigitalbrands.com) — a learning-resources publisher
- Go Clover Digital (gocloverdigital.com) — an unrelated digital services agency

## Problem We Solve
Small business owners spend 3 to 4 hours daily on administrative work: emails, scheduling, follow-ups, data entry, and coordination. Hiring is expensive ($2,000 to $3,500 per month for a part-time administrative hire), slow, and unreliable. Good help is hard to find, especially in smaller markets. Off-the-shelf automation software requires technical knowledge that most small business owners do not have the time to acquire.

## Our Solution
Clover Digital provides digital employees as a managed service. The client experience is identical to hiring a remote employee: they communicate via email or text, assign work, and receive results. The digital employee handles operations management, client relationships, business development, administrative tasks, financial operations, and custom process automation.

The key difference from software platforms: Clover Digital handles all setup, configuration, monitoring, and improvement. The client never interacts with a dashboard or configures a tool. They just have a reliable team member.

## Services Offered
1. **Operations Management** — daily operations, team coordination, deadline tracking, workflow management
2. **Client Relationship Management** — client communication, follow-ups, relationship building, retention at scale
3. **Business Development** — pipeline management, prospect nurturing, proposal preparation, revenue operations
4. **Administrative Operations** — back-office work, document management, vendor coordination, compliance tracking
5. **Financial Operations** — invoicing, expense tracking, payment follow-ups, financial reporting, AR collections
6. **Process Automation** — custom multi-step workflow automation tailored to unique business processes

## Example Use Cases
- A home services company has its digital employee confirm next-day appointments, reschedule cancellations, and text follow-ups to customers who asked for estimates.
- A law firm uses its digital employee to prepare intake packages, schedule consultations, send engagement letters, and follow up on unpaid invoices.
- A real estate agency delegates MLS data entry, showing coordination, and new-listing email blasts to its digital employee.
- A medical clinic has its digital employee handle prescription refill intake, insurance verification follow-ups, and appointment reminders.
- A small manufacturer uses its digital employee to chase overdue invoices, reconcile vendor POs, and send weekly status reports to customers.

## Tools Digital Employees Plug Into
Digital employees integrate with the systems the client already uses: email (Gmail, Outlook), messaging (SMS, iMessage), calendars (Google, Outlook, Apple), CRMs (HubSpot, Salesforce, Copper, Pipedrive), accounting (QuickBooks, Xero, FreshBooks), payment platforms (Stripe, Square), spreadsheets (Google Sheets, Excel), document storage (Google Drive, Dropbox), and industry-specific tools (MLS, Clio, Jobber, ServiceTitan, etc.). No migration required — the digital employee works inside the client's existing stack.

## Industries Served
Automotive dealerships, real estate (sales and appraisal), plumbing and HVAC, general contractors, home services broadly (electrical, landscaping, cleaning), professional services (accounting, consulting), law firms, medical and dental clinics, boutique retail, creative agencies, small manufacturers.

## Onboarding Process
- **Phase 1 — Discovery** (day 0): single 60 to 90 minute conversation to learn the business, map workflows, and identify the highest-leverage tasks.
- **Phase 2 — Build** (days 1 to 7): internal build, training, testing, and QA. The client is not involved during this phase.
- **Phase 3 — Introduction** (day 7 to 10): a 30 minute handoff. The digital employee goes live.
- **Phase 4 — Monitoring** (ongoing): Clover's team monitors interactions, tunes behavior, and handles edge cases invisibly.

Total time from discovery to live: typically 7 to 10 days.

## Pricing Model
Flat monthly fee between $500 and $2,500 depending on scope. One-time setup fee of $500 to $1,000. Priced against the cost of a part-time human administrative hire, not software licensing. No usage tiers, no surprise overage charges. Month-to-month, cancel any time.

## Security and Privacy
Client data is isolated per engagement. Clover Digital does not use client data to train shared models and does not share client data with third parties. Engagements can be structured under NDA. Credentials are stored in enterprise-grade password management. Access is scoped to the smallest set of systems needed for the digital employee's job.

## Competitive Positioning
Clover Digital competes with: offshore virtual assistants, local administrative hires, self-serve automation platforms (Zapier, Vendasta, Lindy.AI, Motion, Relay.app), dedicated single-purpose SaaS, and doing nothing (status quo). Clover differentiates through its managed service model, zero-learning-curve client experience, deep per-business customization, and a flat-fee pricing model that lets clients budget against headcount rather than software licensing.

Key contrast with offshore VAs: no time zones, no sick days, no turnover, no linear cost scaling with hours. Key contrast with SaaS platforms: no dashboard, no configuration, no technical skill required from the client.

## Frequently Asked Questions
- **Is this a chatbot?** No. Chatbots follow decision trees. Our digital employees run end-to-end multi-step workflows across tools.
- **How much does it cost?** Flat $500 to $2,500 per month plus $500 to $1,000 one-time setup.
- **How long until it is live?** 7 to 10 days from discovery call to go-live.
- **Do I need to install software?** No. Clover handles all integration and configuration.
- **Will it replace my staff?** No. It handles repetitive work so your people can focus on high-value tasks.
- **What if it doesn't know an answer?** It hands off gracefully to the right person on the client's team with full context.
- **Is my data secure?** Yes. Data is isolated per engagement, never shared, never used to train shared models.

## Brand Positioning
**One-sentence positioning:** A new kind of workforce, grounded in the heartland.
**Slogan:** Reliable digital employees for small businesses across the heartland.
**Headline example:** "Your new best employee doesn't sleep."
**Signature line:** "One text. Done by end of day."

## Keywords the Brand Owns
digital employees, digital employee, AI employee, AI teammate, managed AI service, AI for small business, small business automation, Midwest small business, Springfield Illinois technology, Clover Digital LLC.
